title: 安田記念の後に・『力』と、

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm the spring King of the Mile!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: She ran that well in those conditions?! Just how much power does she have?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I had no idea she was this good... Taiki Shuttle really is in a league of her own!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I was on the edge of my seat the whole time!
Great job, Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I won't back down for nothin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The crowd looks so happy! Are ya happy too,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Booyahhh! If everybody's happy, I'm happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's one G1 sprint down! Where should I clean
up next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle's fans are drawn in by her speed.
And the race that will give everyone the best view
of that is...
choice_data_list: Next up is the Sprinters Stakes!
Next up is the Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh! That's a little under a mile, ain't it?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I gotcha! I'm gonna show everybody my
super speed!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So don't even think about blinkin'!
